# Code Review Tasks — ~/.claude Configuration
<!-- Generated by /code-review. Review each item, remove any you
     don't want applied, then run: implement the tasks in
     code-review-tasks.md -->

## Must fix (Critical)

- [ ] `settings.json:78` — Remove hardcoded `curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8765/...` from allow list; grants permissionless Mem0 writes from any session. Fix: delete the entry; use `mcp__mem0__add_memories` MCP tool allow instead.
- [ ] `settings.json:80-85,100-106,139-149` — Remove ~20 stale one-off permissions (hardcoded absolute paths to plantuml/corpus files, a literal PR title in a gh allow entry, five echo-exit-code variants). Fix: delete all entries that reference absolute paths under `/Users/scottseely/git/` or contain literal PR titles or one-time commands.
- [ ] `templates/autonomous-settings.json` — Missing MCP tool permissions, `pnpm`, `uv`, `gh`. Autonomous runs that use Mem0, Serena, or Playwright will hit permission prompts mid-run. Fix: add `mcp__mem0__*`, `mcp__serena__*`, `mcp__playwright__*`, `Bash(pnpm *:*)`, `Bash(uv run:*)`, `Bash(uv pip install:*)`, `Bash(gh *:*)`, `Bash(shellcheck:*)` entries.
- [ ] `settings.json` — `mcp__mem0__add_memories` not in allow list. `memory-curator` agent will prompt on every invocation. Fix: add `mcp__mem0__add_memories` alongside the existing `mcp__mem0__search_memory` entry.
- [ ] `hooks/autonomous-toggle.sh:58` — Gitignore check uses `grep -q '\.claude/'` where `.` is a regex wildcard. Fix: change to `grep -qF '.claude/'`.
- [ ] `agents/01-core-development/backend-developer.md`, `agents/04-quality-security/code-reviewer.md` — State 80% coverage threshold; `rules/testing.md` mandates 90/90/90. Fix: update both agents to reference 90% line/branch/function coverage.
- [ ] `rules/parallelism.md` — "always produce an execution plan and present it for review" creates an unsolvable deadlock in autonomous mode. Fix: add an explicit carve-out: "In autonomous mode (mission brief active), skip the review presentation step; log the execution plan to the decision journal instead."

## Should fix (Warning)

- [ ] `rules/parallelism.md` — Agent prompt structure has no "Commit format" section. Agents that commit their own work (per autonomous-execution.md) default to non-Conventional Commits style. Fix: add a mandatory "Commit format" item to the 7-point agent prompt template pointing to `commits.md` format.
- [ ] `rules/parallelism.md` — Agent prompt structure has no "Relevant memories" section. Mem0 institutional knowledge is never injected into agent context. Fix: add a mandatory step 0: "Orchestrator injects any relevant Mem0 memories verbatim into the Context section before dispatching the agent."
- [ ] `rules/parallelism.md` — No model-routing guidance. Fix: add a "Model Selection" section: Opus with adaptive thinking for planning/architecture decisions, Sonnet for implementation, Haiku for scoring/dedup/validation.
- [ ] `rules/lsp.md` — States "LSP automatically reports after every file edit" but no agent has `LSP` in its tools frontmatter. The rule is unreachable by agents. Fix: either add `LSP` to relevant language-specialist agent frontmatter, or add a clarification that agents use Serena as the equivalent and `lsp.md` governs orchestrator-only behavior.
- [ ] `post-compact-context.md` — Too sparse; loses: 90/90/90 coverage rule, parallelism plan-before-executing rule, commit format, agent delegation summary, security error-response rule. Fix: add compact forms of these five rules (target: add ~15 lines total).
- [ ] `hooks/quality-gate.sh:62-67` — Auto-detection runs `npm run ...` unconditionally; breaks pnpm and yarn projects. Fix: detect package manager first: `if [ -f pnpm-lock.yaml ]; then PM=pnpm; elif [ -f yarn.lock ]; then PM=yarn; else PM=npm; fi`, then use `$PM run ...`.
- [ ] `hooks/notify-on-stop.sh` — macOS-only (`osascript`) with no platform guard; throws an error when run in a Linux Docker sandbox. Fix: wrap `osascript` call with `if [[ "$OSTYPE" == "darwin"* ]]; then ... fi`.
- [ ] `rules/extended-thinking.md` — No self-assessment criterion; "complex bug investigation" is too subjective for autonomous use. Fix: add "Self-assessment trigger: if you find yourself uncertain which of 3+ significantly different approaches to take, invoke extended thinking before committing."
- [ ] `settings.json` — `git fetch`, `git show`, `git blame`, `git rebase`, `rg` are in `settings.local.json` but not global `settings.json`; still prompt in normal sessions. Fix: promote these to global settings.
- [ ] `settings.json` vs `templates/autonomous-settings.json` — `WebSearch` (no arg) vs `WebSearch(*)` inconsistency; one is likely a no-op. Fix: audit the correct Claude Code permission syntax and standardize both files.

## Consider improving (Suggestion)

- [ ] `skills/plan-mission/SKILL.md:Phase 4` — Tasks document dependencies but not interface contracts. When T1 produces output T2 consumes, the data shape is undocumented. Fix: add a "Task Interface Contracts" subsection requiring each task to declare output types when another task depends on it (e.g., "T1 outputs `{ tokenId: string, expiresAt: Date }` for T2").
- [ ] `skills/plan-mission/SKILL.md:Phase 1` — Lightweight scan fallback is too shallow; doesn't surface data model assumptions or API boundaries needed for reliable decomposition. Fix: enhance the mid-weight scan to read one sample API handler and one data model file in addition to the manifest and README.
- [ ] `skills/plan-mission/SKILL.md` — No model routing specified for phases that benefit from deeper reasoning. Fix: add guidance to use Opus with adaptive thinking for Phase 3 (architecture decisions) and Phase 4 (decomposition); Sonnet for Phase 6 (brief generation).
- [ ] `skills/explore/SKILL.md` — No inventory schema defined; agents invent their own table formats. Fix: add a standard schema template to Phase 3: `| Repo | Language | Runtime | Framework | Database | Key Deps | Entry | Notes |`.
- [ ] `skills/explore/SKILL.md` — No version CVE/EOL research. Fix: add a WebSearch/WebFetch step per detected runtime/framework version to surface CVE status and EOL dates; append as a "Tech Health" section in `overview.md`.
- [ ] `skills/code-review/SKILL.md:Step 4` — Scoring boundary for Note vs. Suggestion is described in prose but not given to scoring agents as numeric rules. Fix: add explicit thresholds to the rubric given to scoring agents: 0-24 drop, 25-49 Note or Suggestion, 50-74 cap at Suggestion, 75+ keep as-is.
- [ ] `skills/code-review/SKILL.md` — No final verdict criteria. APPROVE vs. APPROVE WITH NITS vs. REQUEST CHANGES is unquantified. Fix: add "APPROVE if Critical=0; APPROVE WITH NITS if Critical=0 and Warning<3; REQUEST CHANGES if Critical>0 or Warning≥3."
- [ ] `.mcp.json` — No GitHub MCP server. `review-pr` and other skills make many `gh api` shell calls that could be structured tool calls. Fix: add `@modelcontextprotocol/server-github` to `.mcp.json`.
- [ ] `rules/` — Three high-value rules are missing entirely: `logging.md` (structured JSON, log levels, required fields, no PII), `error-handling.md` (throw vs return error type, wrap at module boundaries, error message quality), `api-design.md` (resource naming, standard envelopes, versioning strategy). Fix: create each as a new rule file and reference from `CLAUDE.md`.
- [ ] `CLAUDE.md` — Compaction recovery section is buried at the bottom. Fix: move it immediately after "Interaction Style" — it's the most operationally critical piece of information that needs to be front-loaded.
- [ ] `settings.json` — `ENABLE_TOOL_SEARCH=auto` not configured. All MCP tool schemas load upfront, consuming context. Fix: evaluate enabling deferred tool loading; mark Mem0 and Serena as `alwaysLoad: true`, defer the rest.
